CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Insight 2 Design, Inc.
Off Calendar Oct-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Noam Glick of Glick Law Group (619-382-3400) appears telephonically as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Hazel Ocampo N. of Procopio Cory Hargreaves & Savitch LLP (619-238-1900) Appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/opposing party, Insight 2 Design, Inc.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ARTHUR ZIVKOVIC'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Insight 2 Design, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements of Proposition 65. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
